ToolTreaux Silver Quality Testing Kit Acid Solution, Stone Neutralizer Combo

Easily test the quality of silver with ToolTreaux’s Silver Quality Testing Kit with Testing Stone and Neutralizer Combo! The kit includes one 0.5oz bottle of silver grade testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone. The testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with silver, coins, and other precious metals. Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the silver testing solution bottles are comfortable to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution used.

Key Features

  • 3
  • Complete Kit
  • SILVER QUALITY TESTING KIT: Easily test the quality of your silver with ToolTreaux's silver testing solution kits. Kits include one 0.5oz bottle of testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone
  • SILVER TESTING METHOD: Works on any silver; best used on silver that is yet to be smelted due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item
  • EASY USE: Simply place a drop of testing solution on your silver sample deposit and instantly see the results
  • SAFETY FIRT: Included neutralizing solution ensures safe practice and clean up; easily neutralize the harsh chemicals in the testing solution once you are done
  • WARNING: Keep out of reach of children. Exercise extreme caution when opening and using. Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended. Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • Color: Clear

SILVER TESTING KIT METHOD: This silver testing method is best used on silver that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry, sterling silver items or other finished items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finished piece.

INSTRUCTIONS: To test silver quaity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit. Place a small drop solution over the top of the deposit; the quality of the silver is approximated according to the color the solution turns when it is applied to the sample. If the solution turns cream-colored, that indicates high quality silver. If the solution turns black, that indicates coin quality. If the solution turns green, that indicates high amounts of copper/poor quality. If the solution turns gold-colored, that indicates a brass or silver plated item. When done, add an equal amount of neutralizing solution to neutralize the silver solution. Ensure the testing stone has been thoroughly washed and neutralized before performing any testing.

PLEASE NOTE: Testing solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Ensure neutralization of the testing solution after every test by using the neutralizing solution. Read the label on the bottle and follow provided operational instructions.
